summary: Project for 'The Blush' — a professional, crisp website featuring a customer photo gallery with review column.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Luxury salon interior with soft warm lighting, marble surfaces, gold accents, and elegant styling chairs — moody editorial atmosphere, deep charcoal and cream tones (hero-blush.dim_1920x1080.jpg)
- Close-up of a sophisticated hair styling scene with champagne gold and ivory tones, soft bokeh background, editorial and upscale feel (book-banner.dim_1920x600.jpg)

existing_features.title: Redesign the global visual theme for The Blush with a professional, high-end salon aesthetic. Replace the current color palette with a sophisticated scheme using deep charcoal/near-black, warm off-white/cream, and a single refined accent (e.g., champagne gold or dusty rose). Update CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/index.css to reflect these new tokens consistently across light and dark modes.

Update the Layout.tsx navigation header to match the new design system: use the new color tokens, apply a clean minimal nav with generous spacing, refined typography (Cormorant Garamond for the logo/brand name in large elegant serif, Jost for nav links in uppercase tracked letterspacing), and a crisp sticky header with a subtle border or shadow instead of a heavy background.

Restyle the Home page (Home.tsx) hero section with the new visual identity: apply the new hero background image, use an elegant full-viewport hero with a centered text layout, large serif headline in Cormorant Garamond, a clean subheading in Jost, and CTA buttons styled with the new accent color. Update the features grid cards to use the new palette with clean borders and refined spacing.

Apply the new design system to the Services page (Services.tsx), Team page (Team.tsx), Book page (Book.tsx), and Gallery page (Gallery.tsx): update card backgrounds, typography hierarchy, badge styles, status indicators, and section headings to use the new palette and font pairings consistently across all pages.

Update the Admin dashboard (Admin.tsx), AppointmentTable.tsx, and CustomerPhotoManager.tsx to use the new design tokens. Stat cards, tab navigation, table headers, status badges, and action buttons should all reflect the refined professional palette — clean, minimal, and consistent with the rest of the site.

Update the Tailwind configuration (tailwind.config.js) to reflect the new design system: revise the custom color palette (blush, gold, ivory) to the new sophisticated token names and values that match the updated CSS custom properties. Ensure the font family definitions for serif (Cormorant Garamond) and sans (Jost) are preserved and applied as defaults.

Generate and render a new hero background image for The Blush home page as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-blush.dim_1920x1080.jpg. Also generate a refined full-width banner image for the Book page at frontend/public/assets/generated/book-banner.dim_1920x600.jpg. Use these images in the respective page components.

new_feature_requests.summary: Professional new look for The Blush — finest and crisp design aesthetic
